llm.note: Small instruction model: intent routing + phrasing of verified facts. Swap for QWEN3_1_7B_INST_Q4 for stronger tool-calling.

vision.note: Multimodal scene description. On a Lantern Hub you can delegate to a larger Qwen3-VL pair.

ocr.note: Deterministic text extraction — the trustworthy spine for reading mail, labels, signs.

stt.note: Hands-free voice input. Upgrade to WHISPER_BASE_Q8_0 / WHISPER_SMALL_Q8_0 for accuracy.

tts.note: Spoken output. Lantern speaks every result aloud.

embeddings.note: Personal-memory embeddings for private, on-device recall (RAG).

translate.note: Reads foreign signs/menus back in the user's language. Swap the Bergamot pair for other languages.
